set_value.name: $title
set_value.exact: if $d.$title? and $d.$title != null then $d.$title else 'FACTION CONTRACT'

set_value.name: $desc
set_value.exact: if $d.$summary? and $d.$summary != null and $d.$summary != '' then $d.$summary else 'A contract is open for bids — see the listed reward. Fulfil the objective and payment follows.'

do_if.value: $job != '' and $fid != '' and faction.{$fid}? and not Registry.$ByJob.{$key}?

write_to_logbook.title: 'Contract abandoned: ' + $title
write_to_logbook.text: faction.{$fid}.knownname + ' notes the breach of contract. Standing with them has suffered.'

debug_text.text: 'AIC escort BOUND ship=' + $TargetShip.knownname + ' from=' + $DepartureLocation.knownname + ' to=' + (if $TargetLocation? and $TargetLocation != null then $TargetLocation.knownname else 'NULL') + ' (station dock = completion)'
'AIC escort: no bindable freighter for ' + $fid + ' — AO objective stands, timeout recycles'

check_value.value: $TargetShip? and $TargetShip != null and $TargetShip.exists and player.entity.distanceto.{$TargetShip} lt 15km

debug_text.text: 'AIC recover: no abandoned hull in AO — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC deliver: no ware/station — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC evacuate: no viable from/to pair — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC follow: no friendly element in AO — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC recon: no station in AO — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC interdict: no enemy traffic in AO — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC defend: no station in AO — objective stands, window recycles'
'AIC destroy: no live hostiles in AO — objective stands, window recycles'

write_to_logbook.title: 'Contract fulfilled: ' + $title
write_to_logbook.text: faction.{$fid}.knownname + ' confirms the contract complete. Payment released from the faction treasury.'

cue.name: KeepAlive
cue.comment: vanilla ShowOffer_KeepAlive hack (genericmissions.xml:712): a never-true check keeps this offer INSTANCE alive so the accept event has a live listener — without it the instance is disposed the moment its actions complete, which is why attempts 1-3 never fired.

debug_text.text: 'AIC contract stale-on-load cleanup job=' + (if $job? then $job else '?')

set_value.name: $fname
set_value.exact: if $d.$faction? and faction.{$d.$faction}? then faction.{$d.$faction}.knownname else 'High Command'

set_value.name: $summary
set_value.exact: if $d.$summary? then $d.$summary else 'Situation change. Adjust posture and continue the mission.'
